requirement_topic.en: Cell and Battery Pack Safety — TZS-adopted IEC 62133
requirement_topic.zh: 电芯与电池组安全——坦桑尼亚采纳的IEC 62133
requirement_topic.zht: 電芯與電池組安全——坦尚尼亞採納的IEC 62133

summary.en: Portable lithium cells and battery packs entering Tanzania are assessed for safety against the applicable Tanzanian national standard (TZS), which is in practice adopted from the international IEC 62133 series (Safety requirements for portable sealed secondary cells and batteries — Part 2: Lithium systems). Where the product is within the regulated/compulsory scope, the safety evidence is verified through the TBS Pre-shipment Verification of Conformity (PVoC) programme, leading to a Certificate of Conformity and authorisation to use the TBS conformity mark. IEC 62133-2 covers abuse testing (overcharge, short-circuit, crush, drop, thermal abuse, forced discharge) and is the common technical basis accepted internationally and adopted into the TZS catalogue.
summary.zh: 进入坦桑尼亚的便携式锂电芯及电池组，依据适用的坦桑尼亚国家标准（TZS）进行安全评估，该标准实践中采纳自国际IEC 62133系列（便携式密封二次电芯及电池安全要求——第2部分：锂系统）。当产品处于受监管/强制范围内时，安全证据通过TBS装运前合格验证（PVoC）计划核验，进而取得合格证书及使用TBS合格标志的授权。IEC 62133-2涵盖滥用测试（过充、短路、挤压、跌落、热滥用、强制放电），是国际通行并被纳入TZS目录的共同技术基础。
summary.zht: 進入坦尚尼亞的便攜式鋰電芯及電池組，依據適用的坦尚尼亞國家標準（TZS）進行安全評估，該標準實踐中採納自國際IEC 62133系列（便攜式密封二次電芯及電池安全要求——第2部分：鋰系統）。當產品處於受監管/強制範圍內時，安全證據透過TBS裝運前合格驗證（PVoC）計劃核驗，進而取得合格證書及使用TBS合格標誌的授權。IEC 62133-2涵蓋濫用測試（過充、短路、擠壓、跌落、熱濫用、強制放電），是國際通行並被納入TZS目錄的共同技術基礎。

standards_or_laws: TZS national standard adopting IEC 62133-2 — Safety requirements for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries (Tanzania Bureau of Standards)
IEC 62133-2:2017+AMD1:2021 — Safety requirements for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries — Part 2: Lithium systems
TBS Pre-shipment Verification of Conformity (PVoC) — Certificate of Conformity for regulated products

summary.en: China's primary safety standard for portable lithium battery packs is GB 31241 (Safety requirements for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries for use in portable electronic equipment), with GB 18287 for mobile-phone lithium-ion batteries. GB 31241 is technically derived from IEC 62133 but contains national deviations in test severity and acceptance criteria. A GB 31241 report from a Chinese CNAS-accredited laboratory is a domestic-market document and is not, by itself, a TBS Certificate of Conformity; however, because TZS adopts IEC 62133, a test report demonstrating conformity to the IEC 62133-2 edition referenced by TBS (rather than to GB national deviations) is the practical basis accepted under PVoC.
summary.zh: 中国便携式锂电池组的主要安全标准为GB 31241（便携式电子设备用密封二次锂电芯及电池安全要求），手机锂离子电池则为GB 18287。GB 31241在技术上源自IEC 62133，但在测试严苛程度和验收准则方面存在国家偏差。中国CNAS认可实验室出具的GB 31241报告属于国内市场文件，本身并非TBS合格证书；但由于TZS采纳IEC 62133，证明符合TBS所引用IEC 62133-2版本（而非GB国家偏差）的测试报告，才是PVoC下被接受的实际基础。
summary.zht: 中國便攜式鋰電池組的主要安全標準為GB 31241（便攜式電子設備用密封二次鋰電芯及電池安全要求），手機鋰離子電池則為GB 18287。GB 31241在技術上源自IEC 62133，但在測試嚴苛程度和驗收準則方面存在國家偏差。中國CNAS認可實驗室出具的GB 31241報告屬於國內市場文件，本身並非TBS合格證書；但由於TZS採納IEC 62133，證明符合TBS所引用IEC 62133-2版本（而非GB國家偏差）的測試報告，才是PVoC下被接受的實際基礎。

standards_or_laws: GB 31241 — Safety requirements for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries for use in portable electronic equipment (SAC/SAMR)
GB 18287 — General specification for lithium-ion batteries for mobile phones (SAC)

gap.en: Because TZS adopts the international IEC 62133 series rather than China's GB 31241, exporters should build their safety evidence directly against the IEC 62133-2 edition referenced by TBS. Key gaps: (1) GB 31241 contains national deviations (test severity, acceptance criteria) so a GB report may not map one-to-one onto the IEC edition TBS expects; (2) the operative document is a TBS Certificate of Conformity issued through PVoC, not a Chinese certificate; (3) where the product is regulated, the TBS conformity mark must be carried. An existing GB 31241 report can support engineering analysis but should be reconciled to the IEC 62133-2 edition for the PVoC assessment.
gap.zh: 由于TZS采纳国际IEC 62133系列而非中国GB 31241，出口商应直接依据TBS引用的IEC 62133-2版本建立安全证据。主要差距：（1）GB 31241含国家偏差（测试严苛程度、验收准则），GB报告未必能与TBS预期的IEC版本一一对应；（2）实际文件是经PVoC签发的TBS合格证书，而非中国证书；（3）受监管产品须加贴TBS合格标志。现有GB 31241报告可支持工程分析，但应针对PVoC评估调和至IEC 62133-2版本。
gap.zht: 由於TZS採納國際IEC 62133系列而非中國GB 31241，出口商應直接依據TBS引用的IEC 62133-2版本建立安全證據。主要差距：（1）GB 31241含國家偏差（測試嚴苛程度、驗收準則），GB報告未必能與TBS預期的IEC版本一一對應；（2）實際文件是經PVoC簽發的TBS合格證書，而非中國證書；（3）受監管產品須加貼TBS合格標誌。現有GB 31241報告可支持工程分析，但應針對PVoC評估調和至IEC 62133-2版本。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where in scope — safety conformity to TZS-adopted IEC 62133-2, verified through the TBS PVoC programme leading to a Certificate of Conformity and TBS mark, applies before import/market placement
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic market — GB 31241 compliance required under the SAMR framework for portable lithium batteries sold in China

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Tanzanian market entry requires safety evidence against the TZS-adopted IEC 62133-2 standard, verified through the TBS PVoC programme to obtain a Certificate of Conformity and the TBS mark for regulated products. Chinese GB 31241 certification does not by itself satisfy this route because of national deviations; exporters should base testing on the IEC 62133-2 edition referenced by TBS and route it through PVoC.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 进入坦桑尼亚市场须依据TZS采纳的IEC 62133-2标准提供安全证据，并经TBS PVoC计划核验以取得合格证书及受监管产品的TBS标志。中国GB 31241认证因存在国家偏差，本身不能满足该路径；出口商应以TBS引用的IEC 62133-2版本为测试基础并经PVoC办理。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 進入坦尚尼亞市場須依據TZS採納的IEC 62133-2標準提供安全證據，並經TBS PVoC計劃核驗以取得合格證書及受監管產品的TBS標誌。中國GB 31241認證因存在國家偏差，本身不能滿足該路徑；出口商應以TBS引用的IEC 62133-2版本為測試基礎並經PVoC辦理。

source.publisher: Tanzania Bureau of Standards (TBS) — Pre-shipment Verification of Conformity
